title: August 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 6''' is the 218th day of the year (219th in leap years), with 147 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Dianne Crittenden]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Ed Hannigan]] is born.
*1951 – [[Jack Klaff]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Valerie Wildman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Chris Edgerly]] is born.
*[[1997]] – [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Golden Age of the Sith (TPB)|''Tales of the Jedi: The Golden Age of the Sith'']] trade paperback published.
*1997 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 21|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 21]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Insider 61|''Star Wars Insider'' 61]] is published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Core of Corruption]]'' sixth adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Timeline 9: The Mandalorian Wars]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: Agent of the Empire Volume 2—Hard Targets]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 31|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' Part 31]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[A Crash of Fate]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Build Your Own Adventure: Galactic Missions]]'' published in the U.S.
*2019 – ''[[Myths & Fables]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars Annual 2021]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Starfighter Missions]]'' released.
*[[2021]] – "[[Return to Kamino]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – ''[[Weird But True! Star Wars]]'' to be released.
*[[2025]] – [[Legacy of Vader 7|''Legacy of Vader'' 7]] published.
<noinclude>
